description_long: This is a turquoise Nintendo Game Boy Color handheld gaming console, featuring a rectangular plastic body with rounded edges. The front face displays a small color LCD screen, a D-pad, A and B action buttons, and Start/Select buttons, along with a speaker grille at the bottom right. The top edge houses a cartridge slot, currently holding a game cartridge, and the back has a battery compartment with a textured grip. Side views reveal volume and power switches, as well as a link cable port. The device is compact and designed for portability, with all controls and display easily accessible from the front. The branding and model information are clearly visible on both the front and back.
description: A turquoise Nintendo Game Boy Color handheld console with a color LCD screen, physical buttons, and a cartridge slot. Compact, portable, and designed for gaming on the go.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen displaying a game, D-pad, A/B buttons, Start/Select buttons, speaker grille, and Nintendo/Game Boy Color branding.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile, visible volume slider, and part of the cartridge slot at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the battery compartment, cartridge slot with a game inserted, and product information label.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the power switch, link cable port, and the device's curved ergonomic shape.
